title: SimulationRun
description: Schema for a single simulation run result, ensuring data hygiene and provenance (Constitution Principle VI).

network_id.description: Unique identifier for the network graph used in the simulation.

seed.description: Random seed used for the simulation run.

diffusion_rate.description: Calculated rate of energy diffusion (change in spatial variance per step).

topology_class.description: The class of network topology generated.

steps_run.description: Number of simulation time steps executed.

generation_algorithm.description: Name of the algorithm used to generate the graph (e.g., 'erdos_renyi', 'watts_strogatz').

parameter_values.description: Dictionary of parameters used during graph generation.
